overview: A beautiful restaurant website for Padma Home Food, a Hyderabad-based eatery serving fresh veg and non-veg specials. Features a full menu with food photos, veg/non-veg labels, pricing, opening hours, and a contact/support page.
features: Home page with hero, tagline, and opening hours
Full menu with 13 dishes — photos, prices, veg/non-veg badges
Menu filtering by veg and non-veg
Support page with contact form and phone number
Warm Indian food aesthetic with saffron and gold tones
